headline: Barclays lists retail sector winners and losers in an oil shock
summary: Investing.com -- An oil price shock stemming from the Middle East conflict could reshape the U.S. discretionary retail landscape, but Barclays says off-price retailers are best positioned to weather the storm while traditional apparel names face the greatest pressure.

headline: Ulta Beauty, Google partner on AI-powered shopping experiences
summary: The beauty retailer has launched Ulta AI, a shopping assistant available on its website that soon will roll out to its app.

raw.headline: Ulta Beauty, Google partner on AI-powered shopping experiences
raw.summary: The beauty retailer has launched Ulta AI, a shopping assistant available on its website that soon will roll out to its app.

headline: Reexamining Stock Picks Ulta Beauty, Peabody Energy, U-Haul
summary: Looking back at stock picks isn’t just an exercise in keeping score, it’s a way to sharpen the investment process.  Bulls would ideally like to see a recapture of the 200 day simple moving average but this offers good risk/reward here.
